response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX contexts
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis or modification
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
